subcodes.first_line: O Thou Lord, my God, my best Beloved! I beseech Thee by the murmuring breezes of Thy grace, whereby Thou dost breathe life into all created things
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ربی و الهی و محبوبی اسئلک بهبوب اریاح فضلک التی بها احییت الممکنات و
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
